care.summary: A delicate, beautiful fern with very thin black stems and fan-shaped light green fronds. It requires high humidity to thrive.
care.light: Bright, indirect light or partial shade. Do not expose to direct sunlight.
care.water: Keep the soil consistently moist but not soggy. Do not allow the soil to dry out.
care.humidity: Requires high humidity. Best grown in a terrarium or bathroom.
care.fertilizer: Feed with a weak liquid fertilizer once a month during spring and summer.
care.toxicity: Non-toxic to cats, dogs, and humans.
common_issues: Fronds turning brown and crispy from low humidity or dry soil
tips: Keep away from heating vents and drafts.
If the plant dries out and dies back, cut it to the soil line and keep moist; it may regrow.
